zh.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr於1190年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 達姆斯塔特。他和Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1252年在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福利希格享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr于1190年出生在多易傑斯 萊奇格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 達姆斯塔特。他和Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER至少有2个儿子。他去世于大约1252年在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 霍福利希格享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Lichtenberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst, Bernd, Heinz, Wilhelm.
German and Dutch: habitational name from any of numerous places called Lichtenberg in Germany and the Netherlands.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial compound name formed with German Licht ‘light’ (genitive Lichten) + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

variants.name: Lechtenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Fritz.

variants.name: Lichtenberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Dieter, Horst, Kurt.
German: habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called   Lichtenberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr was born in 1190, in Kreis Darmstadt, Grand Duchy of Hesse, German Empire. He had at least 2 sons with Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER. He died about 1252, in Lichtenberg, Hof, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 63.

ja.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herrは1190年にデウトシェス レイチグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス ダルムスタトで生まれた。彼はAdelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILERとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1252年にドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ホフリチテンバーグで63歳で死去した。

ko.Lichtenberg,Starkenburg Darmstadt,Hessen: 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 더스타드트
ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr(은)는 1190년 데우츠체스 라이치 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 더스타드트에서 태어났다. 그는 Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1252년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 호프 리ch텐버그에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Ludwig I. von Lichtenberg Herr родился в 1190 г. в местности крис дармстадт, гроssхирзогтум хессен, деуцчесь раич. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Adelheid VON ETTENDORF-ZINSWEILER. Он умер около 1252 г. в местности личтенбирг, ландкрис хоф, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 63 лет.
